title: Senior Performance Marketing Analyst
matched_skills: SQL & data modelling → SQL (BigQuery or similar)
Funnel & conversion analysis → acquisition funnel analysis
Campaign performance optimisation → performance marketing analytics
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics → CPA / ROAS
Marketing KPI framework design → KPI definition & consistency
Customer segmentation & cohort analysis → customer behaviour & value linking
C-level data storytelling → reporting & actionable insights
Python scripting → data modelling / pipeline support
missing_skills: Paid media channel expertise (Meta Ads, affiliate networks)
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain full acquisition funnel view across Meta, affiliates, SEO, and other channels
Own marketing attribution and measurement: campaign tracking, conversion events, CPA/ROAS/payback models
Integrate marketing spend data with customer behaviour and revenue in BigQuery
Build and maintain performance dashboards (Tableau or similar) for CPA, ROAS, funnel metrics
Collaborate with Performance Marketing, CRM, Product/CRO, BI & Data Engineering on analytical frameworks
recommended_emphasis: Highlight SQL and data modelling work with large marketing datasets — directly matches the BigQuery/SQL requirement
Emphasise funnel and conversion analysis projects with measurable CPA/ROAS outcomes
Showcase any attribution or tracking work (UTMs, pixel setup, GA4/GTM) even if minor
Lead with campaign ROI analytics and e-commerce performance work to address the paid media analytics requirement
Stress cross-functional collaboration with marketing, BI, and product teams
Quantify business impact of data insights (budget decisions, spend optimisation) to match commercial focus
